task_description: Make the Quant-Ecosystem production-grade by fixing dead frontend builds (quantmax, quantneon, quantedits), enhancing the admin panel with real backend data, wiring cross-app shared services (notifications, search, WebSocket events), and ensuring all turbo tasks pass.

verification.summary: All 4 turbo pipelines pass: 133 typecheck, 108 build, 134 test, 112 lint tasks successful. Zero failures. New apps (quantmax, quantneon, quantedits) build with Next.js. Admin panel has real backend integration. Cross-app services wired.
